fragments.content: House style: no external NuGet packages, target net8.0, nullable enabled. Keep the implementation a single pure static method with no side effects.

The implementation must satisfy this xUnit oracle (which you cannot modify). namespace Calc; the class is `public static class StringOps` exposing `public static string Slugify(string s)`. Cases: Slugify("Hello World!")=="hello-world"; Slugify("  Rust & C#  ")=="rust-c"; Slugify("Already-slugged")=="already-slugged"; Slugify("Multiple   spaces")=="multiple-spaces"; Slugify("__Trim__me__")=="trim-me"; Slugify("MiXeD CaSe 123")=="mixed-case-123".

prompt.content: Write the complete contents of Calc/StringOps.cs. Define `namespace Calc;` and `public static class StringOps` with a single method `public static string Slugify(string s)`. Behaviour: lowercase the input (invariant), replace every run of one-or-more non-alphanumeric characters with a single '-', and trim any leading or trailing '-'. Output ONLY the C# source — no prose, no markdown fences.
